name: Miso
story: Miso is Nori's sister and his complete opposite — she announces breakfast, greets strangers first, and has never met a cardboard box she didn't claim.
She and Nori are a bonded pair and must be adopted together. She does the talking; he does the cuddling. Between them it's a full cat.

medical.notes: Spay scheduled with our partner clinic; included in the adoption fee.

photoAlt: Miso, a grey-and-white tabby kitten mid-meow on a teal background
